architectureDecisionSummary.postgisRole: Future public geodata signal query database only.
architectureDecisionSummary.osmStrategy: Geofabrik Turkey extract baseline with ODbL attribution and versioned snapshots.
architectureDecisionSummary.demStrategy: NASA SRTM primary candidate, Copernicus DEM as alternative after license review.
architectureDecisionSummary.afadDaskStrategy: Context-only hazard/legal signal layer, not parcel-level official engineering verification.
architectureDecisionSummary.streetLevelStrategy: Mapillary/KartaView/Google Street View options under API terms and attribution.

signalModelSummary.mediumHighBehavior: Return public context signals with sourceVersion and disclaimers.
signalModelSummary.officialBoundary: No signal may be labeled as official tapu/imar verification.
